case_title: THE PEOPLE OS THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE CO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OS THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE CO BILL HALL BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OS THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE CO BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,580.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OS THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STATE REIMBURSMENT FOR $80.00 FILING FEES(6103.5 GOV. CODE) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OS THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
